sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER E WHERE E.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND E.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND E.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND E.LADDERID in ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE
A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR
A.WRITERID = #userId# )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, F.* FROM ( SELECT E.LADDERID, E.TYPE, E.TITLE, E.WRITERID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN E.WRITERNAME2 ELSE E.WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, E.WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(E.WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, E.STATUS, E.SECRETFLAG, E.DELETEFLAG, E.DEPTID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE LADDERID = E.LADDERID) AS cmt FROM TBL_LADDER E WHERE E.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND E.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND E.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND E.LADDERID in ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE
A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR
A.WRITERID = #userId# ) ORDER BY
WRITEDATE
E.TYPE
E.TITLE
E.WRITERNAME
E.WRITEDATE
E.STATUS
E.SECRETFLAG
( CASE E.WRITERID WHEN #userId# THEN 2 ELSE 1 END )
DESC, E.LADDERID DESC
ASC, E.LADDERID ASC
) F ) WHERE RNUM > #startPoint# AND RNUM <= #startPoint# + #endPoint#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#)

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, D.* FROM ( SELECT A.LADDERID, A.TYPE, A.TITLE, A.WRITERID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.WRITERNAME2 ELSE A.WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, A.WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, A.STATUS, A.SECRETFLAG, A.DELETEFLAG, A.DEPTID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE LADDERID = A.LADDERID) AS cmt FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) ORDER BY
A.WRITEDATE
A.TYPE
A.TITLE
A.WRITERNAME
A.WRITEDATE
A.STATUS
A.SECRETFLAG
( CASE A.WRITERID WHEN #userId# THEN 2 ELSE 1 END )
DESC, A.LADDERID DESC
ASC, A.LADDERID ASC
) D) WHERE RNUM > #startPoint# AND RNUM <= #startPoint# + #endPoint#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER E WHERE E.LADDERID = ANY ( SELECT DISTINCT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE D ON A.LADDERID = D.LADDERID WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId# ) AND D.USERNAME LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%' )
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#)
AND A.TITLE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
AND A.TYPE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
AND A.WRITERNAME LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, E.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT A.LADDERID, A.TYPE, A.TITLE, A.WRITERID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.WRITERNAME2 ELSE A.WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, A.WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, A.STATUS, A.SECRETFLAG, A.DELETEFLAG, A.DEPTID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE LADDERID = A.LADDERID) AS cmt FROM TBL_LADDER A JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE D ON A.LADDERID = D.LADDERID WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId# ) AND D.USERNAME LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%' ORDER BY
WRITEDATE
A.TYPE
A.TITLE
WRITERNAME
WRITEDATE
A.STATUS
A.SECRETFLAG
( CASE A.WRITERID WHEN #userId# THEN 2 ELSE 1 END )
DESC, A.LADDERID DESC
ASC, A.LADDERID ASC
) E) WHERE RNUM > #startPoint# AND RNUM <= #startPoint# + #endPoint#
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, D.* FROM ( SELECT A.LADDERID, A.TYPE, A.TITLE, A.WRITERID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN A.WRITERNAME2 ELSE A.WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, A.WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, A.STATUS, A.SECRETFLAG, A.DELETEFLAG, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE LADDERID = A.LADDERID) AS cmt FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#)
AND A.TITLE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
AND A.TYPE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
AND A.WRITERNAME LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
ORDER BY
WRITEDATE
A.TYPE
A.TITLE
A.WRITERNAME
A.WRITEDATE
A.STATUS
A.SECRETFLAG
( CASE A.WRITERID WHEN #userId# THEN 2 ELSE 1 END )
DESC, A.LADDERID DESC
ASC, A.LADDERID ASC
) D) WHERE RNUM > #startPoint# AND RNUM <= #startPoint# + #endPoint#

select.isEqual: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER F WHERE F.LADDERID = ANY ( SELECT DISTINCT D.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER D JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE E ON D.LADDERID = E.LADDERID WHERE D.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND D.LADDERID IN ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR A.WRITERID = #userId# ) AND E.USERNAME LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%' )
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER D WHERE D.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.LADDERID IN ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE
A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR
A.WRITERID = #userId# )
AND D.TITLE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
AND D.TYPE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
AND D.WRITERNAME LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'

select.isEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, F.* FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT D.LADDERID, D.TYPE, D.TITLE, D.WRITERID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN D.WRITERNAME2 ELSE D.WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, D.WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, D.STATUS, D.SECRETFLAG, D.DELETEFLAG, D.DEPTID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE LADDERID = D.LADDERID) AS cmt FROM TBL_LADDER D JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE E ON D.LADDERID = E.LADDERID WHERE D.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND D.LADDERID IN ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR A.WRITERID = #userId# ) AND E.USERNAME LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%' ORDER BY
WRITEDATE
D.TYPE
D.TITLE
WRITERNAME
WRITEDATE
D.STATUS
D.SECRETFLAG
( CASE D.WRITERID WHEN #userId# THEN 2 ELSE 1 END )
DESC, D.LADDERID DESC
ASC, D.LADDERID ASC
) F) WHERE RNUM > #startPoint# AND RNUM <= #startPoint# + #endPoint#
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, E.* FROM ( SELECT D.LADDERID, D.TYPE, D.TITLE, D.WRITERID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN D.WRITERNAME2 ELSE D.WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, D.WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(D.WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, D.STATUS, D.SECRETFLAG, D.DELETEFLAG, D.DEPTID, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE LADDERID = D.LADDERID) AS cmt FROM TBL_LADDER D WHERE D.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND D.LADDERID IN ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE
A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR
A.WRITERID = #userId# )
AND D.TITLE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
AND D.TYPE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
AND D.WRITERNAME LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%'
ORDER BY
WRITEDATE
D.TYPE
D.TITLE
D.WRITERNAME
D.WRITEDATE
D.STATUS
D.SECRETFLAG
( CASE D.WRITERID WHEN #userId# THEN 2 ELSE 1 END )
DESC, D.LADDERID DESC
ASC, D.LADDERID ASC
) E) WHERE RNUM > #startPoint# AND RNUM <= #startPoint# + #endPoint#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LADDER SET DELETEFLAG = 1, DELETEDATE = #deleteDate# WHERE WRITERID = #userId# AND LADDERID = #ladderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LADDERID, TYPE, TITLE, WRITERID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN WRITERNAME2 ELSE WRITERNAME END AS WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(WRITEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + #offset# / (24 * 60),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, STATUS, SECRETFLAG, DELETEFLAG, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN DEPTNAME2 ELSE DEPTNAME END AS DEPTNAME, DEPTNAME2, LINECNT, LINEARRAY, L.TENANT_ID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PIC, COMPANYID, DEPTID, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN COMPANY2 ELSE COMPANY END AS COMPANYNAME FROM TBL_LADDER L LEFT JOIN( SELECT CN, TENANT_ID, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, COMPANY, COMPANY2 FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CN NOT IN( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) U ON L.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID AND L.WRITERID = U.CN WHERE LADDERID = #ladderId# AND L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT AJ.CN AS USERID, C.DISPLAYNAME AS USERNAME, C.DISPLAYNAME2 AS USERNAME2, B.DISPLAYNAME AS DEPTNAME, B.DISPLAYNAME2 AS DEPTNAME2, C.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PIC, C.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER AJ JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER B ON AJ.DEPTID = B.CN AND AJ.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID JOIN TBL_USERMASTER C ON AJ.CN = C.CN WHERE AJ.CN IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER D WHERE D.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN D.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE D.DISPLAYNAME END = #name#) AND C.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND B.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# AND C.DISPLAYNAME NOT IN ( SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN E.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE E.DISPLAYNAME END FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE E WHERE CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN E.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE E.DISPLAYNAME END = #name# AND E.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND E.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE4 LIKE '%'||#companyID#||'%' ) UNION SELECT F.CN AS USERID, F.DISPLAYNAME AS USERNAME, F.DISPLAYNAME2 AS USERNAME2, F.DESCRIPTION AS DEPTNAME, F.DESCRIPTION2 AS DEPTNAME2, F.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PIC, F.TENANT_ID FROM TBL_USERMASTER F WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND F.DISPLAYNAME = #name# AND F.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND F.DISPLAYNAME NOT IN ( SELECT CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN G.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE G.DISPLAYNAME END FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE G WHERE CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN G.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE G.DISPLAYNAME END = #name# AND G.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND G.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER (TENANT_ID, LADDERID, TITLE, TYPE, SECRETFLAG, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, DEPTNAME, DEPTNAME2, LINECNT, WRITEDATE, COMPANYID, DEPTID) VALUES (#tenant_id#, TBL_LADDER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #title#, #type#, #secretFlag#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #deptName#, #deptName2#, #lineCnt#, #writeDate#, #companyID#, #deptID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER_LINE (TENANT_ID, ID, LADDERID, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, ITEM, LADDERORDER, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2) VALUES (#tenant_id#, TBL_LADDER_LINE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #ladderId#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #item#, #ladderOrder#, #description#, #description2#)
SELECT MAX(LADDERID) FROM TBL_LADDER WHERE WRITERID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(LADDERID) FROM TBL_LADDER WHERE WRITERID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT INB.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, INA.* FROM ( SELECT NVL(O.LADDERID, L.LADDERID) ORIG_ID, O.CHANGELADDERID, L.LADDERID, L.TYPE, L.TITLE, L.WRITERID FROM TBL_LADDER_ORDER O RIGHT JOIN TBL_LADDER L ON L.LADDERID = O.CHANGELADDERID WHERE L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND L.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND L.WRITERID = #userId# AND L.DELETEFLAG = 0 ORDER BY ORIG_ID DESC ) INA ) INB WHERE INB.RNUM > #startPoint# AND INB.RNUM <= #startPoint# + #endPoint#

SELECT INB.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, INA.* FROM ( SELECT NVL(O.LADDERID, L.LADDERID) ORIG_ID, O.CHANGELADDERID, L.LADDERID, L.TYPE, L.TITLE, L.WRITERID FROM TBL_LADDER_ORDER O RIGHT JOIN TBL_LADDER L ON L.LADDERID = O.CHANGELADDERID WHERE L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND L.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND L.WRITERID = #userId# AND L.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND L.TITLE LIKE '%'||#searchInput#||'%' ORDER BY ORIG_ID DESC ) INA ) INB WHERE INB.RNUM > #startPoint# AND INB.RNUM <= #startPoint# + #endPoint#
SELECT LADDERID, CHANGELADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER_ORDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_ORDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER_ORDER(TENANT_ID, ID, LADDERID, CHANGELADDERID, USERID) VALUES (#tenant_id#, TBL_LADDER_ORDER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #ladderId#, #changeLadderId#, #userId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT ID, LADDERID, "COMMENT", USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, WRITEDATE, C.TENANT_ID, U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PIC, C.DEPTID FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT C LEFT JOIN( SELECT * FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND CN NOT IN( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# ) ) U ON C.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID AND C.USERID = U.CN WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERID = #ladderId# ORDER BY WRITEDATE DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER_COMMENT (TENANT_ID, ID, LADDERID, "COMMENT", USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, WRITEDATE, DEPTID) VALUES (#tenant_id#, TBL_LADDER_COMMENT_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #ladderId#, #comment#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #writeDate#, #deptID#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT ID, LADDERID, "COMMENT", USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, DEPTID FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND
ID = (SELECT MAX(ID) FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERID = #ladderId#)
ID = #id#

SELECT L.TENANT_ID, LADDERID, ID AS LINEID, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, U.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PIC, RESULTUSERID, RESULTUSERNAME, RESULTUSERNAME2, ITEM, LADDERORDER FROM TBL_LADDER_LINE L LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND CN NOT IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# ) ) U ON L.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID AND L.USERID = U.CN WHERE L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND LADDERID = #ladderId# ORDER BY LADDERORDER
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LADDER SET LINEARRAY = #lineArray#, status = 1, STARTDATE = #startDate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND LADDERID = #ladderId#

UPDATE TBL_LADDER_LINE SET RESULTUSERID = #resultUserId#, RESULTUSERNAME = #resultUserName#, RESULTUSERNAME2 = #resultUserName2# WHERE LADDERORDER = #ladderOrder# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERID = #ladderId#
UPDATE TBL_LADDER_COMMENT SET "COMMENT" = #comment# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND ID = #id# AND USERID = #userId#
UPDATE TBL_LADDER_LINE SET LADDERORDER = #changeOrder#, ITEM = #changeItem# WHERE ID = #origUser# AND LADDERORDER = #origOrder# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERID = #LadderId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND ID = #id# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT INB.LADDERBMID, INB.BMNAME, INB.USERID, INB.REGDATE, INB.USERNAME, INB.USERNAME2, INB.COUNT FROM ( SELECT BM.LADDERBMID, BM.BMNAME, BM.USERID, BM.REGDATE, INA.USERNAME, INA.USERNAME2, MAX(USERNO) OVER (PARTITION BY BM.LADDERBMID) - 1 AS COUNT, INA.USERNO FROM ( SELECT LADDERBMID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY LADDERBMID ORDER BY ID ASC) AS USERNO FROM TBL_LADDER_BMUSER ) INA RIGHT JOIN TBL_LADDER_BM BM ON BM.LADDERBMID = INA.LADDERBMID WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND BM.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND USERID = #userId# ) INB WHERE INB.USERNO = 1 ORDER BY INB.LADDERBMID DESC

SELECT B.ID, B.LADDERBMID, B.USERID, B.USERNAME, B.USERNAME2, U.COMPANY, U.DESCRIPTION, U.MAIL, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 AS PIC, (SELECT DISTINCT COMPANY FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#) AS COMPANY FROM TBL_LADDER_BMUSER B LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND CN NOT IN ( SELECT CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# ) ) U ON B.TENANT_ID = U.TENANT_ID AND B.USERID = U.CN WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId# ORDER BY B.ID
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER_BM (TENANT_ID, LADDERBMID, BMNAME, USERID, REGDATE, COMPANYID) VALUES (#tenant_id#, TBL_LADDER_BM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #bmName#, #userId#, #regdate#, #companyID#)

INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER_BMUSER (TENANT_ID, ID, LADDERBMID, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, COMPANYID, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2) VALUES (#tenant_id#, TBL_LADDER_BMUSER_SEQ.NEXTVAL,
(SELECT MAX(LADDERBMID) FROM TBL_LADDER_BM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USERID = #writerId#),
#ladderBmId#,
#userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #companyID#, #description#, #description2#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LADDER_BM SET BMNAME = #bmName#, REGDATE = #regdate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId# AND USERID = #userId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_BM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId# AND USERID = #userId#
DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_BMUSER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT C.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND C.CN NOT IN ( SELECT B.CN FROM TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE B WHERE B.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)
